speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Main bahar se wapas toh aa gaya hoon, par is metro shehar mein ekdum misfit lagta hai. Dost ki shaadi tak miss kar di kyunki tau ji bimar the aur unki seva karni thi. Ghar walon ko kuch bol nahi pata kyunki unka garv juda hai mujhse ki main NRI tha, 'settle' hoon. Bas parivaar ki shanti ke liye thakan ka bahana karta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice to keep the family pride intact.
text: Tumhe andar hi andar itna akelapan lag raha hai, par unka garv aur parivaar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye tum sirf thakan ka bahana karte ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Haan, exactly. Unhe lagta hai ki beta bahar se aaya hai toh sab badhiya hai. Par sach mein, main apne hi ghar mein mehmaan jaisa feel karta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of shattering their illusion.
text: Lagta hai jaise agar tumne apni asli feeling bata di, toh unka wo sukoon aur garv toot jayega, isliye chup rehna behtar lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Sahi kaha. Mere dost mujhe puchte hain ki main unse milne kyun nahi aata. Unhe kaise samjhaun ki tau ji ki tabiyat theek nahi aur mujhe wahan hona padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time and duration of this struggle.
text: Itne dino se doston se doori aur tau ji ki din-raat seva, yeh sab akele manage karna kitna lamba aur mushkil safar lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Bahut lamba. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai main hi galat hoon jo aise thoughts la raha hoon. Mujhe toh khush hona chahiye na ki main wapas family ke paas hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue about feeling wrong softly.
text: Tumhe andar hi andar yeh dar lagta hai ki tumhari feelings shayad galat hain, kyunki sab umeed karte hain ki tum khush ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Khush dikhna padta hai. Mere parents bolte hain 'Dekho humara NRI beta sab kuch kitne acche se sambhal raha hai'. Unka dil nahi tod sakta, isliye roz thakan ka bahana karta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently probe the burden of the excuse.
text: Yeh sunkar samajh aata hai ki unki khushi tumhare liye kitni zaroori hai. Jab tum unke aage thakan ka bahana karte ho, tab akele mein kaisa mehsus hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Akele mein bas khaali pan lagta hai. Jaise mera asli wajood yahan fit hi nahi hota. Main na wahan ka raha, na yahan ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying isolation from the relational preservation.
text: Lagta hai ki is koshish mein sabko khush rakhne ki, tum poori tarah se ek isolation aur alien-ness mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Haan isolation hi hai. Doston se bhi door ho gaya aur ghar mein bhi apna asli sach nahi bol sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the feeling of being a misfit as a returnee.
text: Bahar se wapas aane ke baad is metro ki tezi aur ghar ki zimmedariyon ke beech aesa phase aana bahut natural hai, iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum mein koi kami hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Lekin kab tak chalega aisa? Roz subah utho, tau ji ki medicines dekho, apna thoda kaam karo, aur raat ko thakan ka bahana karke so jao.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a brief systemic anecdote from a migrant/NRI perspective.
text: Aisa hota hai yahan. Bahar se aane walon ki life mein yeh reverse culture shock aur family duties ka pressure bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein garv aur izzat ki baatein pehle aati hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Sahi baat hai. Agar main bolunga ki main theek nahi hoon, toh maa rone lagegi aur bolegi 'kya kami reh gayi beta'. Main unko takleef nahi de sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational barrier.
text: Tumhari apni pareshani se zyada tumhe maa ke aansuon ki fikar hai, isliye apne hisse ka dard chupaye rakhna hi behtar lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Haan, bas yahi sach hai meri zindagi ka ab. Par aese toh main andar se poora khokhla ho jaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the helpless feeling of eroding self.
text: Lagta hai jaise sab kuch sambhalte sambhalte tum khud kahin gayab hi hote ja rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan ka bahana karta hoon
text: Bilkul gayab. Ab samajh nahi aata ki aage kya karoon. Koi raasta hai kya jisse main thoda saans le sakun bina unko hurt kiye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide small, viable options that don't add burden.
text: Yeh sochkar hi thoda araam lagta hai ki tum abhi kuch raasta nikalna chahte ho. Hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain: ek, din mein sirf 10 minute akele chat par jaakar walk karna, ya phir din mein ek baar apne us dost ko sirf message karna bina milne ka pressure liye. Kaunsa theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chat par walk karna theek rahega. Wahan kisi ki nazar nahi padegi aur thoda akele reh paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion.
text: Pehle aaj sham ko tau ji ki dawa dene ke baad chat par jana... phir wahan 10 minute sirf apne liye walk karna... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan yeh main kar sakta hoon. Bina bataye, thodi si space mil jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe structurally.
text: Wapas apni zameen par aakar naya balance dhoondhna time leta hai, aur jo yeh thodi si akele ki space hai, wahi tumhe aur family dono ko sambhalne ki takat degi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Mujhe samajhna hoga ki apne liye waqt nikalna galat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate and encourage.
text: Ekdum sahi socha tumne, apni care karna parivaar ki shanti ke khilaf nahi hai, balki usko banaye rakhne ka hi ek hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, main aaj zarur chat par jaunga 10 minute.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror commitment.
text: Tumhare is chote se kadam lene ke faisle mein tumhari parivaar aur khud dono ke liye fikar saaf dikh rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad dheere dheere dost se bhi baat kar hi loon message pe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the opening up.
text: Tum dheere dheere un purane doston ko apni duniya mein wapas aane ki thodi jagah dena chahte ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas ek text drop karunga, jyada lamba discussion nahi karunga abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the boundary setting.
text: Lagta hai is waqt sirf choti si shuruat karna hi tumhe safe aur manageable lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Achha laga aaj baat karke. Kam se kam ek jagah main sach bol paya bina kisi ko naraaz kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect relief.
text: Dil mein thoda halkapan sa lag raha hoga yeh soch kar ki yahan bina kisi fikar ke tum apni baat rakh paaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut halka lag raha hai. Ab main jaunga tau ji ke paas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the return to duty.
text: Tum abhi bhi poori shiddat ke sath apne farz aur zimmedari nibhane ja rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, dhanyawad time dene ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating close.
text: Humesha yaad rakhna, apni is nai duniya mein khud ke liye choti si jagah banana poori tarah se thik hai, take care.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Yahan shehar mein bhasha aur community na hone ki wajah se dum ghut-ta hai, par shaadi mein na ja paane ka asli dukh main Mummy-Papa se chhupata hoon. Main nahi chahta ki biradari mein baat phailay ki main kamzor pad gaya. Unki izzat bachane ke liye main apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational burden of protecting parents' respect.
text: Tumhe is anjaan shehar mein itna isolation mehsoos ho raha hai, par Mummy-Papa ki izzat aur biradari ki fikr mein tum yeh sab khud akele bardaasht kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Haan bhai, gaon mein sabko lagta hai ki inka NRI beta kitna successful hai. Agar unhe pata chala ki main adjustment nahi kar paa raha, toh remittance ki chinta unhe andar tak tod degi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of parents finding out.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki agar unka bharosa aur garv toot gaya, toh unki takleef tumse dekhi nahi jayegi, isliye sach chupana hi theek lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Bilkul theek kaha. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai meri toh aukaat hi yahi hai. Bas paise bhejo aur chup raho, apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon kisi ko bina bataye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue about feeling reduced to just money.
text: Sirf ek kamane wale ki bhumika nibhate hue, apne dard ko andar hi andar daba kar rakhna kitna bhari padta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Bahut bhari. Roz subah utho, anjaan logo ke beech jao jahan bhasha bhi alag hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aata main yahan kar kya raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time and duration of the daily struggle.
text: Har ek naye din, aisi jagah par jahan koi tumhari baat nahi samajhta, lagatar apna kaam karte rehna lamba aur mushkil safar lagta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Mushkil toh hai. Par main apne Mummy-Papa ko call karke bolta hoon 'sab badhiya hai'. Unhe jhooth bolna aur bhi bura lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe the emotional weight of lying to family.
text: Yeh sunkar dukh hota hai ki apno se hi dil ki baat chupani padhti hai. Jab phone rakhne ke baad akele hote ho, tab mann mein kya chalta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Phone rakhne ke baad bas yahi lagta hai ki meri zindagi ek pinjra ban gayi hai. Na wapas ja sakta hoon izzat ke darr se, na yahan khush hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying trapped feeling.
text: Lagta hai jaise in saari family expectations aur remittance ki zimmedari ke beech, tum khud ko poori tarah se phansa hua mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Haan, phansa hua. Agar unhe pata chala ki main kamzor hoon, toh puri biradari thoo thoo karegi. Unki izzat meri khushi se badi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the structural pressure of remittance and biradari.
text: Ghar se door aakar remittance bhejte waqt, biradari ki izzat ko apne akelepan se upar rakhna yahan bahut aam baat hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum kamzor ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Par andar se himmat toot rahi hai. Kabhi lagta hai chhod chaad ke gaon bhag jaun, par wahan udhaar aur rishtedaron ke taane mera intezaar kar rahe honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Disclose systemic commonality among migrants.
text: Bahari shehar mein kaam karne walon mein yeh akelapan bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein kamane wale ko patthar ka samjha jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Patthar hi ban gaya hoon. Par kabhi akele room mein aata hoon toh patthar bhi rone lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror emotional breakdown safely.
text: Tumhare andar ka wo inssan jo sabke liye majboot bana hua hai, akele hote hi thak kar tootne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apna sara akelepan akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Ji. Agar koi mera yeh roop dekh le toh shayad Mummy-Papa ki izzat mitti mein mil jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect relational fear.
text: Apne har aansu ko is dar se chupa rahe ho kyunki tumhe lagta hai tumhari kamzori unka sar jhuka degi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Ab main poori tarah janna chahta hoon ki ab kya karoon? Koi toh raasta hoga thoda chain paane ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Give two actionable, low-pressure steps.
text: Mujhe ye dekh kar himmat milti hai ki tum apne liye raasta dhoondhna chahte ho. Do choti cheezein hum try kar sakte hain: ek, raat ko sone se pehle 5 minute kisi regional gaane ko sunna jo tumhe gaon ki yaad dilaye araam se, ya phir hafta mein ek baar kisi anjaan jagah par chai peete hue 10 minute akele shanti se baithna. Kaunsa theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chai peene wala thoda behtar lag raha hai. Wahan kisi se baat nahi karni padegi aur shanti milegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chai action.
text: Pehle aaj duty ke baad kisi nukkad waali tapri par jana... phir ek cup chai lekar bas aas paas dekhna bina kisi ko sooche... bas itna hi aaj ke liye kaafi hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan yeh asaan lag raha hai. Bas chupchap chai pikar nikal aunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic normalisation of adapting.
text: Bahar shehar mein aakar apna astitva sambhalne mein waqt lagta hai, aur aise chote break lena us struggle ko kam karne ka bada hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap sahi keh rahe ho. Isse meri izzat ya paise bhejne par bhi farq nahi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm logic of small step.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, aaj zaroor try karta hoon. Shukriya baat sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror intention.
text: Aaj ke din ka aakhir tum ek naye aur shant tareeqe se karne ka iraada rakhte ho.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror forward motion.
text: Apne parivaar ko bachane ke saath saath, tum apne aap ko bhi thodi si raahat dena seekh rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kyunki uske bina main shayad sach mein tut jaunga ek din.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the realization.
text: Andar hi andar yeh baat saaf ho rahi hai ki thoda sahara tumhe bhi chahiye taaki tum unka sahaara ban sako.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul yahi baat hai. Bas abhi duty pe jata hoon wapas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect determination.
text: Lagta hai ek nayi taqat ke saath tum ab kaam par wapas jane ko tayar ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Nayi taqat nahi bas ek umeed ke sath ja raha hoon aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the hope.
text: Apne kartavya ko poora karte waqt is halki si umeed ko saath lekar chalna kaafi maayne rakhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Warm closing.
text: Humesha yaad rakhna, dusron ka dhyan rakhne ke liye apna dhyan rakhna bhi zaroori hai, take care.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Rishton ki garima ke liye main bas muskurata hoon
text: Wapas India aakar lag raha hai jaise main pardesi hoon, par jab shaadi miss hui toh maine bas caregiving burnout ka bahana kiya taaki ghar mein koi kalesh na ho. Agar maine bataya ki main yahan misfit hoon, toh gaon mein sab kahenge ki shehar ki hawa lag gayi hai aur Papa ka sar jhuk jayega. Rishton ki garima ke liye main bas muskurata hoon, bhale hi andar se main bilkul toot chuka hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element of hiding pain to prevent conflict and protect the father's honor.
text: Tumhe andar se itna akelapan mehsoos ho raha hai, par apne Papa ka sar na jhuke aur ghar mein kalesh na ho, isliye tum bas apni takleef chupa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker

strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and exhaustion of carrying this secret.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Rishton ki garima ke liye main bas muskurata hoon

text: Haan, bas thoda waqt chahiye khud ko sambhalne ke liye. Phir shayad sab aasan lagne lage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the gradual process of adjustment.
text: Dheere dheere waqt ke saath tum is naye mahaul mein apne liye ek jagah banane ki koshish kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish toh karni padegi. Papa ka sar bhi uncha rakhna hai aur khud ko bhi bachaana hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the dual commitment.
text: Dono zimmedariyan — unki izzat aur apni mental shanti — in dono ko ek sath balance karne ka irada pakka kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Aaj chat par jaroor jaunga sham ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the feeling of hope.
text: Dil mein ab thodi tasalli aur aage badhne ki ek nayi umeed si jag rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, thodi tasalli toh mili hai aapse baat karke. Main shuruwat karta hoon aaj se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the courage to take a step.
text: Apne farz ke beech apne liye yeh chota sa kadam uthane ki tumhari himmat sach mein maayne rakhti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Main abhi chalta hoon, ghar mein sab intezaar kar rahe honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a warm closing thought.
text: Humesha yaad rakhna, dusron ka dhyan rakhne ke liye apna dhyan rakhna bhi bahut zaroori hai, take care.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har dard ko 'thakan' bol kar taal deta hoon
text: Kya bataun, halat aisi hai ki dost ki shaadi tak attend nahi kar paya kyunki ghar ki zimmedariyon ne yahan Surat mein bilkul nichod diya hai. Par main apni is mental struggle par 'natak' ka thappa nahi lagne dena chahta. Ghar walon ka main akela breadwinner hoon, unko na lage ki main nakamyab ho raha hoon. Unke bharose aur parivaar ki harmony ke liye main bas har dard ko 'thakan' bol kar taal deta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice of hiding pain to protect family peace and trust.
text: Tumhe andar se itni pareshani mehsus ho rahi hai, par parivaar ki shanti aur unka bharosa toot na jaye, isliye tum apni takleef ko sirf apne tak hi rakh rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhaisaab. Gaon mein sab sochte hain main yahan shehar mein bahut badhiya set hoon. Agar bata diya ki andar se kitna ghut raha hoon, toh wo log bahut darr jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of letting the family down.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki agar ghar walon ke aage apni asli halat bata di, toh unki umeedon par paani phir jayega aur wo bahut fikar karne lagenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Waise bhi yahan kaam aur paise bhejne ka itna pressure hai ki dum ghutta hai. Upar se shaadi mein na ja paane ka dukh. Par koi gaon se phone kare toh main yahi kehta hoon ki bas kaam se thaka hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and cumulative exhaustion of working away from home.
text: Itne waqt se akela is shehar mein aur gaon se doori, har roz in zimmedariyon ka bojh uthate uthate tum poori tarah se thak chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kayi baar toh lagta hai sab chhod-chhad ke wapas chala jaun, par wahan fir ghar kaise chalega? Majboori hai meri yahan rukna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying feeling of being trapped by duty.
text: Lagta hai jaise is poori zimmedari aur ghar walo ko khush rakhne ki koshish mein, tum khud ko poori tarah se trapped aur majboor mehsus kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har dard ko 'thakan' bol kar taal deta hoon
text: Phansa hua hi hoon. Agar main kisi ko apna sach bataun toh sab mujhe judge karenge aur ise 'natak' bolenge. Isliye main bas har dard ko 'thakan' bol kar taal deta hoon taaki koi aur sawaal na kare.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue softly without questioning.
text: Tumhari pareshani ko koi sach manne ke bajaye use natak samjhega, is baat ka gehra darr tumhe andar tak rok leta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi mein. Kabhi kabhi raat ko neend nahi aati yeh soch kar ki meri apni koi zindagi bachi bhi hai ya nahi, ya main sirf ek kamane wali machine ban ke reh gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the isolation of being a migrant breadwinner.
text: Bahar shehar aakar kaam karne walon mein yeh akelapan bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki breadwinner ko samaj mein patthar ka man liya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi baat hai. Patthar hi samajhte hain sab. Dost ki shaadi mein nahi gaya toh wahan se bhi taane aaye ki main shehar ja kar bada aadmi ban gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the sadness of being misunderstood by friends too.
text: Doston aur ghar walon, dono taraf se umeedon ke beech phans kar, tumhe samajhne wala wahan koi nahi bacha is baat ka sach mein bada dukh hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har dard ko 'thakan' bol kar taal deta hoon
text: Dukh toh bahut hai bhaiya. Par kya karein, jab tak haath pair chal rahe hain, tab tak ghar walon ko sambhalna hai. Main bas har dard ko 'thakan' bol kar taal deta hoon aur kaam pe jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe what happens internally behind the excuse of 'thakan'.
text: Yeh sun kar samajh aata hai ki sabko sambhalne ka yeh ehsaas kitna bhari hai. Jab tum akele hote ho is dabaye hue dard ke sath, toh mann mein kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele mein bas ghutan hoti hai. Rone ka mann karta hai par darr lagta hai ki agar main andar se toot gaya toh gaon mein baithe maa-baap ka sahara kaun banega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the protective duty frame.
text: Khud ko bikharne se sirf isliye rok rahe ho kyunki apne parivaar ke sahare aur unki ummeedon ko tum kisi bhi haal mein tootne nahi dena chahte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur unko dukh mein dekhne se acha hai main khud akele jhel loon. Par ab aage aise kaise chalega? Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, ab kya karoon main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide actionable, low-barrier steps to get breathing room.
text: Mujhe yeh dekh kar himmat milti hai ki tum apne liye raasta dhoondhna chahte ho. Do choti cheezein hum try kar sakte hain: ek, din mein sirf 5 minute akele chhat par jaakar bina phone ke khuli hawa mein walk karna, ya phir din mein ek cup chai bilkul akele aur shanti se peena. Kaunsa theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chhat par walk karna theek rahega. Wahan kam se kam factory aur room ke ghutan se door thodi khuli hawa toh milegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the process step by step.
text: Pehle aaj duty khatam hone ke baad seedhe chhat par jana... phir wahan 5 minute sirf aas-paas dekhna bina kisi kaam ki soche... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh main aaram se kar sakta hoon. Apne liye thoda sa time nikalna toh zaroori lag raha hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize taking breaks for migrant workers.
text: Shehar mein itni zimmedariyon ka bojh uthate hue apne astitva ko zinda rakhne ke liye, aise chote breaks transition aur is thakan ko manage karne ka ek bahut bada hissa hote hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Agar main lagatar machine ki tarah chalta raha toh shayad jaldi hi jal jaunga andar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift towards self-care alongside duty.
text: Apne parivaar ko sambhalne ke saath-saath, ab tum apne dimaag ko bhi thoda sukoon dene ki koshish karne ko aage rakh rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sukoon dena hi padega bhaiya. Agar main theek nahi rahunga toh unka guzara kaise chalega gaon mein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm the self-care logic.
text: Tumhari yeh soch bilkul theek hai, apni thodi si care karna parivaar ko bikharnewale darr se bachane ka hi ek bohot zaroori hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehli baar kisine meri 'thakan' ke peeche ka asli dard samjha. Hamesha toh bas log paise ka hi sochte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relief of feeling seen beyond the role.
text: Dil ka boj thoda halka mehsoos ho raha hai yeh dekh kar ki yahan tumhari asli mehnat aur takleef ko pehchana gaya, sirf kamai ko nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut halka laga. Lag raha tha main khud ko bilkul bhoolta ja raha hoon is sab pressure mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate taking time for self.
text: Apne haq ke liye yeh chota sa kadam lena aur khud ko yaad rakhna bilkul sahi hai, isme koi aisi baat nahi hai jiski wajah se tumhe bura lage.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Ab main roz apna thoda waqt nikalunga. Chhat wala ye rule ab roz manunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the commitment.
text: Har din ke is chhote se naye rule ko lagatar aage nibhane ka tumhara irada poori tarah pakka ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ek choti si aadat badalne se kam se kam din acha nikalega mera.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Link the self-care directly back to duty empowerment.
text: Yeh ehsaas hona ki khud ko thoda theek rakhna hi tumhare farz ko lamba kheenchne mein madad karega, sach mein ek badi baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ab main chalta hoon, factory ki agli shift ka time ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the renewed energy and determination.
text: Ek naye hausle aur thodi si nayi umeed ke sath tum wapas apni us duty par lautne ke liye bilkul tayar lag rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed toh hai ab. Dhanyawad mera saath dene aur sunne ke liye bhaisaab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating close.
text: Humesha yaad rakhna ki dusron ka sahara banne ke liye, apna khud ka sahara banna bhi bahut maayne rakhta hai, apna khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Wapas India aane ka return shock itna shiddat ka hai ki ab is metro city ki bheed se darr lagta hai. Shaadi miss hone par maine bas caregiving ki thakan ka bahana kiya taaki 'log kya kahenge' wali baat na uthe. Main nahi chahta ki meri wajah se Mummy-Papa ke sapne tootein. Parivaar ki shaan aur 'maryada' ke liye main apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice to protect parents' dreams and family pride.
text: Tumhe is shehar ki bheed mein itna akelapan mehsoos ho raha hai, par Mummy-Papa ke sapne aur parivaar ki shaan banaye rakhne ke liye tum apna yeh poora dard akele hi chupa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Haan bhaisaab. Unhe lagta hai unka NRI beta settle hokar lauta hai. Agar unhe pata chala ki main yahan set nahi ho paa raha, toh 'log kya kahenge' soch kar wo toot jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of family devastation due to societal judgment.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki agar bahar walon ki baaton ki wajah se unka bharosa tuta, toh unki wo takleef tumse bardasht nahi hogi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Bilkul nahi hogi bardasht. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai shayad mujh mein hi koi kami hai. Sab log yahan aaram se reh rahe hain, sirf mujhe hi yeh ghutan ho rahi hai. Isliye chupchap apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue softly, framing it as a heavy burden of self-blame.
text: Doosron ko aaram se rehte dekh kar tumhe andar hi andar yeh dar lagta hai ki shayad yeh ghutan mehsus karna tumhari apni koi kami hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Sahi kaha. Din bhar office mein, aur phir caregiving. Kisi se apne dil ki baat bol bhi nahi sakta. Maryada rakhni padti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time and continuous nature of the hidden struggle.
text: Office aur ghar ki lagatar zimmedariyon ke beech, har roz apni asal feelings ko chupana bahut lamba aur thaka dene wala safar lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Thaka dene wala toh hai. Jab log puchte hain 'kaisa chal raha hai?', toh bas muskurakar bolta hoon 'sab theek'. Par andar ki ghutan badhti ja rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe into the experience of hiding the truth.
text: Yeh sun kar lagta hai ki muskurane ka boj uthana asaan nahi. Jab bahar sabko 'sab theek' bolne ke baad tum akele hote ho, toh mann mein kya chalta hai?

speaker: Insight
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Akele mein yahi lagta hai ki main bas ek showpiece ban gaya hoon family ki shaan ke liye. Meri apni aawaz kahin dab gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying feeling of being trapped by the family image.
text: Lagta hai jaise in saari umeedon aur family ki maryada ko sambhalte hue, tum apne hi andar poori tarah se majboor aur phansa hua mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Majboor hi hoon. Agar kuch bola toh 'log kya kahenge' wali chinta Mummy-Papa ki jaan nikal degi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the pressure of return migration and societal judgment.
text: Bahar se wapas aane par shehar ke naye mahaul mein akela lagna aur parivaar ki izzat ki fikr mehsus karna yahan bahut natural hai, iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum kamzor ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Par aisa lagta hai ki akele hi chalta rahunga kab tak? Apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon, par ab himmat jawab de rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic context about return shock.
text: Aisa hota hai yahan. Bahar se lautne walon ke beech yeh return shock aur family expectations ke tale dabna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein kamyabi ka show zaroori mana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Wahi show maintain kar raha hoon. Dost ki shaadi par nahi gaya toh sabne poocha. Maine keh diya ki Mummy-Papa ki care karni padti hai, time nahi milta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the protective barrier of the excuse.
text: Tumhe apne doston se bhi apna asli darr chupana padta hai, taaki family image par koi sawaal na uthe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Haan, agar sach pata chalega toh meri family pe umeedon ka saara pressure aa girega, jo main nahi chahta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relational sacrifice.
text: Unki khushi ko mehfooz rakhne ki koshish mein tum apna har connection aur har sach kurbaan kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne alienation ko seene mein dafan kiye baitha hoon
text: Kurbaan hi ho gaya hoon. Par ab is ghutan se kuch theek karna chahta hoon. Koi raasta hai kya jisse thodi raahat mile aur unhe dukh bhi na ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide safe, low-barrier options to get some breathing room.
text: Mujhe yeh dekh kar himmat milti hai ki tum kuch raasta nikalna chahte ho. Hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain: ek, din mein sirf 5 minute akele chhat par khuli hawa mein jaana bina kisi phone ke, ya phir 10 minute akele chai peete hue apne purane din yaad karna bina future pressure ke. Kaunsa theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chhat par jaana theek lag raha hai. Ghar ke kalesh se door thodi hawa toh milegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the process step by step.
text: Pehle aaj shaam ko jab family ka pressure thoda kam ho, tab chhat par jana... phir wahan 5 minute sirf shanti se aas paas dekhna bina maryada ki soche... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan yeh thik hai. Isse na 'log kya kahenge' ki baat aayegi aur na kisi ko pata chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe taking space as a structural necessity.
text: Bahar se akar dobara yahan adjust hote waqt, apni aawaz aur pehchan ko zinda rakhne ke liye aisi thodi si khud ki space banaye rakhna bahut zaroori hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Agar main khud hi toot gaya toh Mummy-Papa ka dhyan kaun rakhega. Unki izzat banaye rakhne ke liye mujhe thoda theek rehna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm the self-care logic through a duty lens.
text: Tumhari yeh soch bilkul sahi hai ki parivaar ki shaan aur unka dhyan rakhne ki buniyad ismein hai ki tum khud ko kitna sambhal paate ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you bhaisaab. Pehli baar kisine is alienation ko samjha bina mujhe galat thehraye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relief of being seen.
text: Dil mein thoda halkapan mehsoos ho raha hai yeh jaankar ki bina kisi judgement ke tumhari sachchai ko yahan jagah mili.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bahut halka lag raha hai. Ab main roz chat par time nikalunga apne liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the commitment to regular self-care.
text: Ab se har roz khud ko thodi si akelepan ki azaadi dene ka tumhara irada pakka ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isse kam se kam roz ki ghutan to thodi kam hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Link the action to the relief it brings.
text: Yeh naya chota kadam tumhari roz ki us thakan ko manage karne mein bada sahara banega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Ab thoda theek lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the presence of hope.
text: Dil mein ab ek sukoon aur thodi si nayi umeed mehsoos ho rahi hai aage badhne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bilkul. Main ab apne kaam par wapas jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the return to duties.
text: Is nayi raahat aur chote se plan ke saath, tum apni zimmedariyon ki taraf lautne ke liye phir se taiyar ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhaisaab. Shukriya time dene ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a warm closing.
text: Humesha yaad rakhna, parivaar ke liye majboot rehne ke chakkar mein apna bhi khayal rakhna bahut zaroori hai, apna dhyan rakhna.
